Paradigmpackages
Typingstatic · type-first
TargetRust → native
LicenseMIT

Releases

Download prebuilt Faber CLI archives and browse every published tag in the faberlang/releases asset repository. This page is for installing the compiler CLI, not for building the compiler from source.

Getting started

PathWhat it covers
Install and downloadCurrent release, PATH setup, verify, first faber check
Quick tourLanguage shape in a few minutes
Hello, FaberFirst package
CommandsDaily CLI loop
ProjectsReal package layout
ExamplesPublic sample packages

Build-from-source instructions are intentionally not linked here. Use the prebuilt archives unless you work on the private compiler tree.

Latest release — Faber 1.1.1

FieldValue
ProductFaber CLI
Version1.1.1
Tagfaber-v1.1.1
Published2026-07-17
GitHubfaber-v1.1.1
LicenseMIT

Binaries

PlatformArchiveSizeSHA-256
macOS arm64faber-v1.1.1-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz5.1 MBchecksum
Linux x64faber-v1.1.1-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz5.7 MBchecksum

Extract the archive and put the faber binary on your PATH. Step-by-step: Install and download.

Historical releases

Every tag currently published under github.com/faberlang/releases, newest first. Faber tags are the user CLI. Radix tags are historical compiler CLI archives (most are macOS arm64 only).

_Inventory snapshot from the GitHub Releases API. 41 tags, regenerated for this page._

faber-v1.1.1

Faber CLI · published 2026-07-17 · GitHub release

Source of truth

Assets live in the public faberlang/releases repository. When a new tag is published, regenerate this page with generator/scripts/generate-releases-page.py and rebuild the site.

See also

LinkRole
Install and downloadRecommended install path
HistoryProject timeline and origins
faberlang/releases on GitHubRaw tag list and assets
